close_reason: Completed: jsdeps-gen, js-deps-cell.nix, JavaScript adapter, turnkey module integration with pnpm support
description:
Create jsdeps-gen tool that generates Buck2 targets from pnpm lockfile.

**Why pnpm:**
- Stricter dependency resolution (no phantom deps)
- pnpm-lock.yaml is well-structured and deterministic
- Used by rules_js (Aspect) - proven approach
- Better suited for monorepo setups

**Implementation:**
1. Parse pnpm-lock.yaml
2. Generate Nix derivations to fetch npm tarballs
3. Create BUCK files for each package
4. Organize into jsdeps cell

Depends on: native TypeScript toolchain support

See: examples/typescript-hello/ for context
title: TypeScript deps cell: pnpm integration
